creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
The commit [1] that fixed this issue did not include a PR: reference so was not visible here:

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/418473

@Timur, please include all bugzilla issue references in commit logs, as it enables proper/easier tracking.

The above commit also needs to be MFH'd. cc'ing ports-secteam
